texto: We cannot force others to behave differently if they disagree with us
autor: but if we change what we are saying or doing they will respond differently.
explicacao: Citação de but if we change what we are saying or doing they will respond differently. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We cannot force others to behave differently if they disagree with us” articula reflexao, nabil-n-jamal, cannot em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
